THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARCACCINI, LORENZO D. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 201 TURK STREET $2,905.00 RENT, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,705.00, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT ALLOWED TO MAKE TIME PAYMENTS. IF TIME PAYMENTS ARE NOT MET, THEN UPON 48 HOURS NOTICE THE PLTF MAY APPLY TO COURT EX PARTE FOR AN ORDER LIFTING THE STAY OF EVICTION.
